cases.caption: A heavy wooden door slams once in a quiet empty hallway.
A large dog barks three times inside a reverberant concrete garage.
Steady rain falls on a metal roof with distant rolling thunder.
Ceramic dishes clatter while running water splashes into a kitchen sink.
A motorcycle approaches from far away, passes close by, and recedes.
A person knocks a steady five-beat rhythm on a hollow wooden table.
A solo cello plays a slow low melody in a small room.
Crickets chirp continuously beside a crackling campfire in a quiet forest.
